frontmatter_compliance.notes: Description is 1444 chars — exceeds the 1024-char Anthropic hard ceiling (brief flags as FAIL). Otherwise compliant: kebab-case name, valid semver, no angle brackets, allowed-tools hyphenated, owns/composes_with/spawned_by present.

description_quality.notes: Strong action verbs (Lead, INVOKES, DISPATCHES), explicit exclusions, keyword variants — but 1444 chars exceeds the 1024 hard ceiling. Essay-length where a tight trigger paragraph is needed.

progressive_disclosure.notes: Body 233 lines / ~3330 words — within the 5000-word soft ceiling for a heavy skill. All references well-organized and linked with when-to-read guidance. Largest reference is phase-guide.md at 185 lines (below 300-line TOC threshold).

instruction_clarity.notes: Numbered Quick Start 0-14, clear imperative voice, good WHY rationale (50% effort on design). Step 9a interleaved with 10-13 awkwardly. Steps 3 and 13 are dense paragraphs mixing multiple actions.

coordination.notes: Ownership minimal and correct (only .gitignore pattern, shared_read for contracts/ and .claude/handoffs/). Composes_with exhaustive and accurate. file-ownership.md reference exists. spawned_by correctly empty for top-level coordinator.

completeness.notes: All 9 references/*.md files exist. qa-report-schema path at L153 resolves to roles/qe-agent/references/qa-report-schema.json. Definition of Done checklist is thorough.

anti_patterns.notes: Dedicated Anti-Patterns table with prevention rationale. Minor: duplicate Anti-Pattern header at L194-196 below the main table. DoD has 9 + 9a + 10 numbering glitch. No hardcoded project paths or excessive MUST/NEVER without rationale.

critical.fix: Compress to ≤200 char tight trigger paragraph; move long INVOKES/DISPATCHES enumeration and 'does NOT preempt' list into a new ## Composition body section.

important.item: Definition of Done numbering bug (9 + 9a then 10)
important.fix: Renumber 9a → 10 and shift 10-13 down to 11-14, or fold 9 + 9a together with sub-bullets.

important.item: Orphan duplicate 'Anti-Pattern' header below main Anti-Patterns table
important.fix: Delete and add as a new row in the L191 table: 'Spawning without explicit AFK/HITL classification | Every agent dispatch must declare it can finish unattended.'

nits.item: Quick Start uses 0-indexed step which can confuse
nits.fix: Rename Step 0 to Step 1 and shift subsequent.

nits.item: Field order drift: allowed-tools after owns rather than before
nits.fix: Move allowed-tools to between min_plan (L8) and owns (L9) per house style.

nits.item: composes_with mixes plugin-namespaced (claude-mem:*) with bare names without note
nits.fix: Add a body comment that some composed skills are external (plugins, superpowers).

top_fixes.fix: Compress description below 1024-char ceiling; move enumerations to a Composition body section
Fix Definition of Done numbering (9, 9a, 10 sequence)
Merge orphan Anti-Pattern header into the main Anti-Patterns table as a new row
